creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
I have been unable to compile openast5romenace for about 6 months now but I have the previous version still installed and working just fine so whatever the last update to this port did appears to be what broke it for me.

How-To-Repeat: Completely up to date ports tree.  I can provide list of installed ports if it is needed.  I have the NVIDIA driver installed.

[tethys]:/usr/ports/games/openastromenace> sudo make clean

  Policy CMP0003 should be set before this line.  Add code such as

    if(COMMAND cmake_policy)

    endif(COMMAND cmake_policy)

  as early as possible but after the most recent call to
  cmake_minimum_required or cmake_policy(VERSION).  This warning appears
  because target "AstroMenace" links to some libraries for which the linker
